title: senecio eremophilus var. kingii
intro: Senecio eremophilus var. kingii, also known as King's Groundsel, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Australia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio eremophilus var. kingii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic for wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio eremophilus var. kingii are often infused in hot water to make a tea or used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
